termsOfUse.title: Imibandela Yokusetshenziswa
termsOfUse.welcome: Siyakwamukela ku-VirtualMD.app ("Inkonzo", "Isiza"), ephethwe yi-MindScript Technologies, LLC ("MindScript", "thina", "thina", "wethu"). Le MiBAndELO Yokusetshenziswa ("Imibandela") ilawula ukufinyelela kwakho nokusetshenziswa kwewebhusayithi yethu, ama-persona e-AI, okuqukethwe, nezinsiza. Ngokufinyelela noma ukusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukuxhomeka kule MiBAndELO kanye neNqubomgomo yethu Yobumfihlo, efakwe lapha ngesithenjwa. Uma ungavumi nale MiBAndELO, ungasebenzisi iNkonzo.

serviceDescription.title: 1. Incazelo YeNkonzo
serviceDescription.content: I-VirtualMD.app ihlinzeka ukufinyelela kuma-persona e-AI athuthukile ahloselwe ukunikeza ulwazi nolwazi olubhekene nempilo ngokuya ngezincwadi zezokwelapha, iziqondiso zekliniki, nedatha yokuqeqesha ye-AI. Le Nkonzo inikezelwe IZINJONGO ZOLWAZI NEMFUNDO KUPHELA futhi AYISOZE ibe yisikhundla sokunakekelwa kwezempilo kochwepheshe, ukuxilongwa, noma ukwelashwa. Kufanele uxhumane nochwepheshe bezempilo abaqinisekisiwe ngaphambi kokwenza noma yisiphi isinqumo sezempilo esisekelwe kulwazi olutholwe kuNkonzo yethu.

acceptanceOfTerms.title: 2. Ukwamukela Imibandela
acceptanceOfTerms.content: Ngokubhalisa, ukufinyelela, ukuphequlula, noma ukusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukuthi usufundile, uyaqonda, futhi uyavuma ukuxhomeka kule MiBAndELO. Umele ukuthi usuneminyaka yokwenza izivumelwano ngokomthetho. Ukusebenzisa kwakho iNkonzo kubalwa njengosayine wakho wenkinobho kule MiBAndELO.

eligibility.title: 3. Ukufaneleka
eligibility.ageRequirement: Ukuze usebenzise iNkonzo ye-VirtualMD.app, kufanele ube neminyaka engu-18 noma ubudala obusemthethweni bendawo yakho, noma yiliphi eliphakeme. Uma usebenzisa iNkonzo egameni lenhlangano, umele futhi uqinisekise ukuthi unegunya lokuyibopha le nhlangano kule MiBAndELO, futhi uyavuma ukuxhomeka ngayo egameni lenhlangano.
eligibility.legalCapacity: Kufanele futhi ube namandla omthetho okungenela kule MiBAndELO. Awukwazi ukufinyelela noma ukusebenzisa iNkonzo uma ukwenqatshelwe ukuthola izinsiza ngaphansi komthetho osebenzayo noma uma uke wasuswa noma wasuswa yiMindScript.
eligibility.territorialRestrictions: Ukufinyelela iNkonzo ezindaweni lapho okuqukethwe noma ukusetshenziswa kwayo kungemthetho kukhawulelwe ngokuphelele. Kufanele usebenzise iNkonzo ngokuhambisana nemithetho yezwe kanye nehadiyasi yakho. Abasebenzisi banomthwalo wokuhambisana nayo yonke imithetho kanye nemigomo yendawo mayelana nokuziphatha ku-inthanethi, okuqukethwe okwamukelekayo, nolwazi lwezempilo.

userAccounts.title: 4. Ama-Akhawunti Omsebenzisi Nokubhalisa
userAccounts.registrationRequirements: Ungadingeka ubhalise futhi udale i-akhawunti ukuze uthole ezinye izici zeNkonzo. Ngesikhathi ubhalisa, uyavuma ukuhlinzeka ngolwazi oluqondile, lwamanje, noluphelele ngawe futhi ugcine futhi ubuyekeze ngokushesha ulwazi lwe-akhawunti yakho.
userAccounts.accountSecurity: Unomthwalo wokugcina imfihlo yamakhredenshiyali wakho we-akhawunti nakuzo zonke izenzo ezenzeka ngaphansi kwe-akhawunti yakho. Uyavuma ukwazisa ngokushesha iMindScript nganoma yikuphi ukusetshenziswa okungagunyaziwe kwe-akhawunti yakho noma ukuphulwa kokuphepha. I-MindScript ngeke ibe necala nganoma yiluphi ukulahlekelwa noma umonakalo okhishwa ngenxa yokungakwazi kwakho ukuvikela ulwazi lwe-akhawunti yakho.
userAccounts.accountTermination: I-MindScript igodla ilungelo lokumisa noma ukuphelisa ama-akhawunti aphula le MiBAndELO noma nganoma imuphi omunye umgomo wokuzikhethela.
userAccounts.singleAccount: Umsebenzisi ngamunye angagcina i-akhawunti eyodwa kuphela. Ukwakha ama-akhawunti amaningi ngomsebenzisi oyedwa akuvunyelwe ngaphandle kokugunyazwa ngokusobala yiMindScript.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Amalungelo Empahla Yezengqondo
intellectualProperty.ownershipRights: I-Nkonzo nokuqukethwe kwayo konke, izici, nokusebenza kwayo (kufaka phakathi kodwa kungagcini kulolu lwazi, isoftware, umbhalo, ukuboniswa, izithombe, ividiyo, umsindo, kanye nokuklanywa, ukukhethwa, nokuhlelwa kwazo) kungumnikazi we-MindScript Technologies, LLC, abanikazi balo, noma abanye abahlinzeki balowo msebenzi futhi kuvikelwe yimithetho ye-copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, neminye imithetho yamazwe ngamazwe yezobunikazi noma yezimpahla.
intellectualProperty.limitedLicense: Ngokuhambisana nokuhambisana kwakho nale MiBAndELO, iMindScript ikunika ilayisense elilinganiselwe, engenakudluliselwa, engakhiyi, futhi engasuswa, yokufinyelela nokusebenzisa iNkonzo kuphela ngokusetshenziswa kwakho siqu okungeyona inzuzo.
intellectualProperty.prohibitedUses: Ngaphandle kokuvunyelwe ngokusobala kule MiBAndELO, awukwazi ukuphindaphinda, ukusabalalisa, ukuguqula, ukudala imisebenzi ewumthombo wayo, ukubonisa umphakathi, ukwenza umphakathi, ukuphinda ushicilele, ukulanda, ukugcina, noma ukudlulisa noma yiluphi uhlobo lwendawo kuNkonzo yethu ngaphandle kwemvume ebhaliwe yeMindScript.
intellectualProperty.userContent: Ngokungenisa, ukuthumela, noma ukubonisa okuqukethwe kuNkonzo, unikeza iMindScript ilayisense yomhlaba wonke, engenakudluliselwa, engenamalungelo okhokhelwayo, yokusebenzisa, ukuphinda uphinde, ukuguqula, ukuvumelanisa, ukushicilela, ukuhumusha, ukudala imisebenzi ewumthombo wayo, ukusabalalisa, nokubonisa okuqukethwe ngenhloso yokusebenza nokuthuthukisa iNkonzo.
intellectualProperty.feedback: Noma yiziphi iziphakamiso, amazwana, noma izindatshana ongazinikeza mayelana neNkonzo ziyazithandela ngokuphelele futhi sizokhululeka ukuzisebenzisa njengoba sibona kufanelekile ngaphandle kwesibopho kuwe.

acceptableUse.title: Inqubomgomo Yokusetshenziswa Okamukelekayo
acceptableUse.intro: Uyavuma ukusebenzisa i-VirtualMD.app kuphela ngezinjongo ezisemthethweni futhi ngokuhambisana nale MiBAndELO. Uyavuma ukuthi awusoze usebenzise iNkonzo:

unlawful.title: Ngenjongo engemthetho
unlawful.description: Kufaka phakathi ukuphula noma yimuphi umthetho wombuso, wesifundazwe, wasemphakathini, noma wamazwe ngamazwe.

advertising.title: Ukuthumela noma ukuhlela ukuthunyelwa kwanoma yiluphi uhlobo lwezikhangiso noma impahla yokukhangisa
advertising.description: Ngenkathi kunganamvume ebhaliwe yangaphambi kwethu, kufaka phakathi 'junk mail', 'chain letter', 'spam', noma omunye umkhankaso ofanayo.

impersonate.title: Ukuzifihla noma ukuzama ukuzifihla njengeMindScript
impersonate.description: Ngokufana nomsebenzi weMindScript, umsebenzisi omunye, noma iyiphi enye umuntu noma inhlangano.

nefarious.title: Ngenjongo ezimbi nganoma iyiphi indlela
nefarious.description: Uyavuma ngokusobala ukuthi awusoze usebenzise iNkonzo ukuze uthole ulwazi, iziqondiso, noma izindlela zokulimaza wena noma abanye. Lokhu kufaka, kodwa akugcini lapho, ucwaningo lwezindlela zokuzilimaza, udlame, imisebenzi engavamile, noma yini engadala ubungozi kuwe noma komunye umuntu. Ukusebenzisa ipulatifomu ngezinjongo ezinjalo kuyaphulwa kwale MiBAndELO futhi kungaholela ekushushisweni ngokushesha kwe-akhawunti nokubika eziphathimandla ezifanele.

interference.title: Ngezindlela eziphazamisa ukusebenza kahle kweNkonzo
interference.description: Kufaka ukufaka amagciwane, ama-trojan horse, ama-worm, ama-logic bomb, noma ezinye izinto eziyingozi noma ezisongelayo; ukuzama ukuthola ukufinyelela okungagunyaziwe, ukuphazamisa, ukulimaza, noma ukuphazamisa noma iyiphi ingxenye yeNkonzo, iseva, ikhompyutha, noma i-database exhunyiwe.

harmOthers.title: Ukulimaza noma ukuzama ukulimaza abanye
harmOthers.description: Kufaka kodwa kungagcini ekusebenziseni ulwazi oluvela eNkonzo ukudala ukulimala komzimba, komzwelo, noma kwengqondo.

harmAnimals.title: Ukulimaza noma ukuzama ukulimaza izilwane
harmAnimals.description: Kufaka ukusebenzisa iNkonzo ukuthola ulwazi oluhloselwe ukudala ukuhlupheka, ukulimala, noma ukufa kwezilwane.

asIs.title: 1. Isevisi Inikezwa "NJENGOBA IKHO"; ULWAZI KUPHELA
asIs.content: Ulwazi nezinsiza ezinikezwa yiVirtualMD.app, kuhlanganise konke okuqukethwe okukhiqizwe yizipersona ze-AI, kunikezwa ngaphansi kwe-"NJENGOBA IKHO" nange-"NJENGOBA ITHOLAKALA" ngenhloso YOLWAZI NEMFUNDO KUPHELA. I-MindScript ayenzi noma yiziphi izitatimende noma iziqinisekiso, ezicacile noma eziyimfihlakalo, mayelana nokusebenza kweNkonzo noma ulwazi, okuqukethwe, izinto, noma imikhiqizo ehlanganisiwe kuNkonzo. Uyavuma ngokusobala ukuthi ukusebenzisa kwakho iNkonzo kusemuyini wakho ingozi.
asIs.warning: I-VirtualMD.app inikeza ULwazi KUPHELA. AKUWO umlingisi wokunakekelwa kwezempilo, ukuxilongwa, noma ukwelashwa okuvela kumhlinzeki oqeqeshiwe. KUFUNEKA ukuthi uxhumane nochwepheshe bezempilo abaqinisekisiwe ngaphambi kokuthatha noma yisiphi isinyathelo esisekelwe kulwazi olutholile kuNkonzo yethu. Njalo cela izeluleko kochwepheshe bakho bezempilo nganoma yimiphi imibuzo mayelana nesimo sezempilo. Ungaze unakekele izeluleko zochwepheshe noma ulinde ukuzifuna ngenxa yalokho okwenzile kuNkonzo.
asIs.limitations: I-MindScript ayinikezi ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha noma ukwelashwa. Okuqukethwe okukhiqizwe yi-AI kungase kube nephutha noma kushodayo naphezu kwezinqubo zokuqinisekisa. Ukunakekelwa kwezokwelapha kudinga ukuhlolwa komuntu siqu kochwepheshe abanelayisense. Ulwazi lwezempilo lungadala ukuguga. Umlando wakho wezempilo udinga ukuhlolwa kochwepheshe. I-Nkonzo ayikwazi ukufaka esikhundleni sobuchwepheshe, ukuhlakanipha, noma ukunakekelwa kochwepheshe bezempilo.
asIs.fdaWarning: I-Nkonzo, okuqukethwe kwayo, kanye nezipersona ze-AI AZIVUMELWANGA yi-FDA noma yimuphi omunye umtshali-mthetho njengedivayisi yezokwelapha noma ekuhloleni noma ekwelapheni.

noHipaa.title: 2. Akukho Ukuhambisana ne-HIPAA Ngokusetshenziswa Okuvamile
noHipaa.content: Uyavuma ngokusobala ukuthi i-VirtualMD.app, phakathi kwesethulo sayo sabathengi, AYISOZE IBE YISEVISI EHLANGABEZA IZIDINGO ZE-HIPAA ngokusetshenziswa yi-HIPAA Covered Entities noma ama-Business Associates aphatha i-PHI njengoba kuchazwe ku-HIPAA (1996).
noHipaa.details: Nakuba i-MindScript isebenzisa izinyathelo eziqinile zokuphepha (ezinemininingwane kuNqubomgomo Yobumfihlo), uhlaka lwepulatifomu, ukuphathwa kwedatha, nezinhlelo zokusebenza zeNkonzo ejwayelekile azihlangabezani nezidingo ze-HIPAA Security Rule ngaphandle kwe-BAA ekhethekile.
noHipaa.agreement: Ngokusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukuthi AWUZOSESEBENTSHA ukuyigcina, ukucubungula, noma ukuyidlulisela i-PHI ngendlela edinga ukuhambisana ne-HIPAA kweMindScript, ngaphandle uma unebhulogi ye-BAA ehlangene neMindScript Technologies, LLC ngenhloso ekhethiwe. Uyavuma ukuthi izinga elifanele lokuphepha kwedatha yilolo lwezindlela zebhizinisi e-U.S., hhayi izindinganiso ze-HIPAA ze-PHI.

dataSecurity.title: 3. Ukukhawulelwa Kwesibopho Mayelana Nokuphepha Kwemininingwane
dataSecurity.content: I-MindScript isebenzisa izinyathelo zokuphepha ezivumelekile ngokwezohwebo, kufaka i-encryption kanye nezinqubo zokuqinisekisa ubuqiniso (ezinemininingwane kuNqubomgomo Yobumfihlo), ukuvikela ulwazi olunikeziwe kuNkonzo. Kodwa akukho uhlelo lokuphepha olungenakwephulwa.
dataSecurity.warning: Ngakho-ke, ngokusebenzisa le Sayithi, uyavuma ngokusobala ukuthi nakuba i-MindScript izokwenza imizamo efanele ukuvikela idatha yakho ngokuhambisana nezindlela zebhizinisi, ASIQINISI UKUPHEPHA NGOKUPHELELEYO KOLWAZI LWAKHO. Uyavuma ukuthi AWUKUKHOLOKI FUTHI AWUZUKUMANGALA iMindScript Technologies, LLC, AMA-AFFILIATES, ABAHLELI, IMIQATHABANE, ABASEBENZELI, ABAJWAYE, noma ABA-LICENSORS BAKHO nganoma yiziphi izindleko, ukulahleka, izindleko, noma izinxephezelo eziphuma ekungeni okungagunyaziwe, ekusetshenzisweni, ekudalulweni, ekuguqulweni, noma ekonakaleni kolwazi lwakho (kubalwa nokwephulwa kwedatha), inikezwa ukuthi i-MindScript isebenzise izinyathelo ezifanele zokuphepha. Ukusebenzisa kwakho iNkonzo kubalwa njengokwamukela kwakho lesi sifo.

generalLiability.title: 4. Ukukhawulelwa Kwesibopho Sokujwayelekile

emergency.title: 5. Izimo Eziphuthumayo
emergency.content: I-VirtualMD.app AYIKHO ukukwenza esikhundleni sakho ezimweni eziphuthumayo. Le Nkonzo inikezela ulwazi kuphela futhi ayikwazi ukuthumela izinsizakalo eziphuthumayo. Uma unephuthumayo lezokwelapha, shayela ngokushesha izinsizakalo zakho eziphuthumayo (isb., 911, 999, 112, 000) noma uthole usizo lwezokwelapha ngokushesha kochwepheshe abaqinisekisiwe. Unendima yakho kuphela yokufuna ukunakekelwa okufanele.

privacyPolicy.title: Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo
privacyPolicy.intro: Le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ichaza ukuthi iMindScript Technologies, LLC iqoqa kanjani, isebenzisa, futhi iveze kanjani ulwazi ngawe ngewebhusayithi yethu neNkonzo yeVirtualMD.app. Le nqubomgomo ifakwe kuMiBAndELO Yokusetshenziswa.

dataPledge.title: 1. Isithembiso Sethu Se-Privacy Yedatha
dataPledge.content: Ku-VirtualMD.app, ubumfihlo nokuphepha kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu kubaluleke kakhulu. Sizibophelele ekugcineni imfihlo nokuthembeka kwedatha oyithemba kithi. Ipulatifomu yethu yakhelwe ngezinyathelo eziqinile zokuphepha ukuvikela ulwazi lwakho ekuhlaselweni, ekudalulweni, ekuguqulweni, nasekuchithweni.

security.title: Imizamo Yezokuphepha:
security.description: Sisebenzisa izivumelwano ezisezingeni lomkhakha zokufihla idatha ngesikhathi sokudlula nasemathulini, kanye nezinhlelo zokuphepha eziyingqayizivele ezifaka i-2FA eyimpoqo.

noPII.title: Akukho Ukusetshenziswa Kwangaphandle Kwe-PII:
noPII.description: Asisebenzisi ulwazi lwakho ngendlela engakutholakalisi ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacile.

noSale.title: Akukho Ukuthengiswa Kolwazi Lomuntu Siqu:
noSale.description: Asisoze sathengisa ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu kwamanye amaqembu.

anonymized.title: Idatha Engabonakali Yokuqinisa:
anonymized.description: Sisebenzisa ngokuqinile idatha eyenziwe kafa futhi exutshwe (nge-PII yonke isusiwe) ukuze sithuthukise ukunemba, ukusebenza, nokuphepha kwamamodeli e-AI nezici zepulatifomu. Lokhu akuvumeli ukuchazwa komsebenzisi ngamunye.

infoCollection.title: 2. Ulwazi Esiluqoqa & Ezinye Imininingwane Yobumfihlo
infoCollection.content: Siqoqa ulwazi olunikezwe nguwe ngqo, ulwazi esiluqoqa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokusebenzisa iNkonzo, nolwazi oluvela kwimithombo yangaphandle.
infoCollection.accountInfo: Ulwazi Lwe-akhawunti: Lapho ubhalisa, siqoqa ulwazi olufana negama lakho, ikheli lakho le-imeyili, nenombolo yocingo (ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa).
infoCollection.userContent: Okuqukethwe Komsebenzisi: Siqoqa ulwazi oluhlinzekwa lapho usebenzisa iNkonzo, kuhlanganise nombhalo ofakwe kumaphasiwedi we-chat, ulwazi lwephrofayela (njengohlu lwemithi, uma lunikeziwe), nempendulo.
infoCollection.usageInfo: Ulwazi Lokusebenzisa: Sizoqoqa ngokuzenzakalelayo ulwazi ngomsebenzi wakho neNkonzo, njengokuthi ikheli lakho le-IP, uhlobo lwe-browser, ulwazi lomshini, i-OS, amakhasi avulekile, izixhumanisi ezichofoziwe, kanye namadethi nezikhathi zokuvakasha kwakho.
infoCollection.cookies: Amakhukhi Nezobuchwepheshe Ezifanayo: Sisebenzisa amakhukhi nezobuchwepheshe bokulandela ukusebenza kuzinsiza zethu. Ungalelekelela ukubhukha kwakho ukuthi ungalwamukela amakhukhi noma uzise lapho zithunyelwa. Kodwa uma ungawamukeli amakhukhi, kungase kungasebenzi ezinye izingxenye zeNkonzo.

howWeUse.title: Sisebenzisa Kanjani Ulwazi
howWeUse.intro: Silusebenzisa ulwazi esiluqoqa ngezizathu eziningi, kuhlanganise:
purposes: Ukucubungula ukuthengiselana nokuthumela imininingwane ehlobene, kuhlanganise nezimvume nezikhombi (uma zikhona).
Ukuthumela izaziso zobuchwepheshe, izibuyekezo, izaziso zokuphepha, nemiyalezo yokwesekwa nokuphatha.
Ukuphendula amazwana akho, imibuzo, nezicelo nokuhlinzeka insizakalo yamakhasimende.
Ukuxhumana nawe mayelana nemikhiqizo, izinsiza, izipesheli, izikhuthazo, imiklomelo, nemicimbi inikezwa yiMindScript nabanye.
Ukuqapha nokuhlaziya amathrendi, ukusetshenziswa, nemisebenzi ehlobene neNkonzo.
Ukuthola, ukuhlola, nokuvimbela ukuthengiselana okungamanga nezinye izenzo ezingekho emthethweni.
Ukuhlela okokuqukethwe nokuthuthukisa iNkonzo nokuhlinzeka ngezici ezihambelana nephrofayela yomsebenzisi noma izintshisekelo.
Ukuthuthukisa ukunemba, ukusebenza, nokuphepha kwamamodeli wethu e-AI usebenzisa idatha engabonakali.
Ukuqhuba noma yiluphi olunye uhlelo oluchazwe kuwe ngesikhathi idatha yaqoqwa.

howWeShare.title: Sabelana Kanjani Ngolwazi
howWeShare.vendors: Nabathengisi Nabahlinzeki Bezinsiza: Singabelana ngolwazi nabahlinzeki bangaphandle, abeluleki, nabanye abahlinzeki bezinsiza abakudinga ukuze benze umsebenzi egameni lethu.
howWeShare.legal: Njengomphendulo Enqubweni Yomthetho: Singadalula ulwazi uma kudingeka ngumthetho noma ngokukholwa okuhle ukuthi kuyadingeka ukuhambisana nesibopho somthetho.
howWeShare.consent: Ngemvume Yakho: Singabelana ngolwazi ngemvume yakho noma ngokuyala kwakho.
howWeShare.businessTransfers: Ukudlulisela Kwebhizinisi: Singabelana noma sidlulisele ulwazi ekuhlanganiseni, ekuthengisweni kwezimpahla zenkampani, ekuxhaseni ngemali, noma ekutholeni.
howWeShare.aggregated: Idatha Ehlanganisiwe Noma Engasafani Nokubonakaliswa: Singabelana ngolwazi oluhlanganisiwe noma olungekho umuntu olwazile, olungasetshenziswa ukukukhomba.

choices.title: Izinketho Zakho Zobumfihlo
choices.accountInfo: Ulwazi Lwe-akhawunti: Ungavuselela, ulungise, noma ususe ulwazi ngawe nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokungena ku-akhawunti yakho noma uxhumane nathi.
choices.deletion: Ukususwa Kwedatha: Unamathuluzi okususa unomphelo izingxoxo eziyimfanelo noma i-akhawunti yakho yonke.
choices.cookies: Amakhukhi: Iziphequluli eziningi zivume amakhukhi ngokuzenzakalela. Ungakhetha ukuwasusa noma ukuwavinjelwa.
choices.promotional: Ukuxhumana Kokukhangisa: Ungakhetha ukungatholi ama-imeyili wokukhangisa ngokulandela imiyalelo kuma-imeyili athunyelwe.

infoCollection.retention: Ukugcinwa Kwedatha: Sigcina ulwazi esiluqoqa ngawe inqobo nje lapho kudingekile ngenhloso ekuqaleni yaqoqwa ngayo. Sigcina ulwazi lwe-akhawunti inqobo nje lapho i-akhawunti yakho isebenza futhi esikhathini esifanele ngemuva kwalokho.
infoCollection.international: Ukudluliselwa Kwamazwe Ngamazwe Kwemininingwane: I-MindScript isekwe e-United States, futhi siprosesa futhi sigcine ulwazi e-U.S. Ngokusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ekudlulisweni kolwazi lwakho e-U.S.
infoCollection.children: Ubumfihlo Bezingu-13 Ezingaphansi: Le Nkonzo ihloselwe abadala futhi ayiqondiswe ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13. Asiqoqi ngokuqaphela ulwazi lomuntu siqu ezinganeni.

securityPractices.title: 5. Izindlela Zokuphepha ze-VirtualMD.app

password.title: Ukufihla Iphasiwedi:
password.description: Amaphasiwedi afihlwa ngokusebenzisa ama-algorithm ejwayelekile embonini.

twoFactor.title: Ukuqinisekiswa Kwezici Ezimbili (2FA):
twoFactor.description: Kuyimpoqo kuwo wonke ama-akhawunti, kudinga ukuqinisekisa ngofakazela wesibili (isb., ikhodi ekhelini le-imeyili/uhlelo).

threeFactor.title: Inketho Yokuqinisekiswa Kwezici Ezintathu (3FA):
threeFactor.description: Ukuvikela okwengeziwe okukhetha ngohlelo lwephasiwedi, ikhodi ye-imeyili, kanye nekhodi ye-SMS.

dataEncryption.title: Ukufihla Kwedatha:
dataEncryption.description: Ulwazi (kufaka izingxoxo) lufihlwa lapho lugcinwa nangaphandle (TLS/SSL).

deletion.title: Ukususwa Kwedatha Ngokungapheli:
deletion.description: Ungasusha unomphelo izingxoxo noma i-akhawunti yakho yonke. Ulwazi olususwe alunakubuyiselwa kusistimu yethu enkulu.

access.title: Izilawuli Zokufinyelela:
access.description: Ukufinyelela kwirekhodi ledatha yomsebenzisi kubasebenzi kulawulwa, kunqunyelwe, kubhalwe phansi, futhi kulawulwe izinqubomgomo zangaphakathi. Ukuhamba-hamba okuvamile kuyavinjelwe.

securityPractices.conclusion: Lezi zinyathelo zinikeza ukuphepha okuqinile kwe-akhawunti, kodwa khumbula ukuthi akukho uhlelo oluphe 100% luphephile.

hipaaReiteration.title: 6. I-VirtualMD.app & Ukucatshangelwa kwe-HIPAA (Ukuphindaphinda)
hipaaReiteration.content: Njengoba kushiwongo ku-Disclaimers, insizakalo ejwayelekile ye-VirtualMD.app AYI-HIPAA-compliant yokusetshenziswa yi-Covered Entity noma i-Business Associate ephatha i-PHI ngaphandle kwe-BAA ekhethekile. Nakuba sisebenzisa izinyathelo eziqinile zokuphepha, insizakalo yethu ejwayelekile isebenza ngaphansi kwezindlela zebhizinisi ezijwayelekile, hhayi izidingo ze-HIPAA Security Rule.

thirdParty.title: 7. Ukusetshenziswa Kwedatha Ngabahlinzeki be-AI Engine Bangaphandle
thirdParty.intro: I-MindScript ihlanganisa nabahlinzeki abahamba phambili bemodeli ye-AI (isb., OpenAI, Anthropic, Google).

mindscript.title: VirtualMD.app:
mindscript.description: Sisebenzisa kuphela idatha eyenziwe kafa futhi exutshwe ukuze sithuthukise uhlelo lwangaphakathi.

providers.title: Abahlinzeki be-API ye-AI Bangaphandle:
providers.description: Abahlinzeki abakhulu abafinyelelwa nge-API bavame ukusho kumigomo yabo ukuthi idatha ethunyelwe nge-API AYIsetshenziselwa ukuqeqesha imodeli yabo yomhlaba wonke. Silungiselela ukusetshenziswa kwethu kwezinsiza ukuze kuhambisane nezinketho zokuvikela ubumfihlo. Bheka imigomo yabo ethile ukuze uthole imininingwane.

changesToTerms.title: Izinguquko Kule MiBAndELO NeNqubomgomo
changesToTerms.content: Singahle sibuyekeze futhi sivuselele le MiBAndELO ngezikhathi ezithile ngokuthanda kwethu. Wonke ama-oguquko ashaywa ngokushesha lapho esethulwe, futhi asasebenza ekufinyeleleni nasekusebenziseni iNkonzo emva kwalokho.
changesToTerms.notice: Ukusebenzisa kwakho okuqhubekayo iNkonzo ngemuva kokushicilelwa kweMiBAndELO ebuyekeziwe kusho ukuthi uyayamukela futhi uyavuma izinguquko. Kulindeleke ukuthi ubheke leli khasi njalo ukuze wazi nganoma yiziphi izinguquko.
changesToTerms.materialChanges: Uma senza izinguquko ezibalulekile kule MiBAndELO, sizokunazisa nge-imeyili futhi/noma ngokuthumela isaziso kuNkonzo ngaphambi kokwenza izinguquko zisebenze.

termination.title: Ukuphela
termination.userTermination: Ungaphelisa i-akhawunti yakho futhi uyeke ukusebenzisa iNkonzo nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokulandela imiyalelo ngaphakathi kweNkonzo noma uxhumane nathi.
termination.serviceTermination: I-MindScript ingamisa noma iphelise ukufinyelela kwakho kuzo zonke noma ezingxenyeni zeNkonzo, ngenhloso yayo kuphela, ngosaziso noma ngaphandle kwaso, nganoma yimuphi umgomo, kufaka phakathi ukuphulwa kwale MiBAndELO.
termination.effectOfTermination: Uma sekuphelile, ilungelo lakho lokusebenzisa iNkonzo liyaphela ngokushesha. Zonke izinhlinzeko ezizohlala ziphila ngisho nakupheliswa kwesivumelwano zizohlala zisebenza.
termination.noLiability: Asizoba necala kuwe noma kunoma yiluphi uhlangothi lwesithathu nganoma yisiphi ukupheliswa kokufinyelela kwakho iNkonzo.

governingLaw.title: Umthetho Ophatha Nokuxazulula Ukungaboni Ngasolinye
governingLaw.governingLaw: Le MiBAndELO izophathwa futhi ichazwe ngokuhambisana nemithetho yaseSifundazweni sase-Delaware, e-United States, ngaphandle kokubheka izimiso zokuphikisana komthetho.
governingLaw.jurisdiction: Uyavuma ukungenelela ngaphansi kwezinkantolo zase-Commonwealth of Massachusetts, e-United States.
governingLaw.arbitration: Noma iyiphi impikiswano evela kulobu buhlobo noma ehlobene neNkonzo izoxazululwa ngokuxazulula ngokungqubuzana okuqinile ngokuhambisana nemithetho ye-American Arbitration Association, okuzenzakalelayo eMassachusetts.
governingLaw.classAction: Uyavuma ukuthi noma yiziphi izinqubo zokuxazulula impikiswano zizokwenzeka ngendlela yomuntu ngamunye futhi hhayi njengeklasi, ehlelwe, noma njengesimo sommeli.

contact.title: Ulwazi Lokuxhumana
contact.content: Uma unemibuzo mayelana nale MiBAndELO noma iNqubomgomo Yobumfihlo, sicela uxhumane nathi ku: <emailLink>legal@virtualmd.app</emailLink> noma ngephepha lethu le-Contact Us.

miscellaneous.title: Ezinye
miscellaneous.entireAgreement: Le MiBAndELO iyisivumelwano esiphelele phakathi kwakho neMindScript maqondana nokusetshenziswa kweNkonzo.
miscellaneous.severability: Uma noma yiziphi izinhlinzeko zale MiBAndELO zitholwa zingenamthetho noma ezingasebenzi, ezinye izinhlinzeko zizohlala zisebenza ngokuphelele.
miscellaneous.waiver: Ukungasebenzisi kweMindScript ilungelo noma inhlaka yale MiBAndELO ngeke kubhekelelwe njengokudluliselwa kwalelo lungelo noma inhlaka.
miscellaneous.assignment: Awukwazi ukudlulisa noma ukuthuthela le MiBAndELO, ngokomthetho noma ngenye indlela, ngaphandle kwemvume ebhaliwe yeMindScript.
